title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) might have struggled to maintain the recovery trend in the first half of Q1 with severe-than-expected staffing shortages and supply issues leading to procedural deferrals.

title: 3 Medical Product Stocks Poised to Beat This Earnings Season
text: Medical product companies' results are likely to reflect base business recovery on a year-over-year basis. Let's see how ALC, ZBH and CSII are poised ahead of their earnings releases.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Stock For Now
text: Investors are optimistic about Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) given robust demand for its ROSA robotics line and continued investment in profitable business areas.

title: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) Hurt by China VBP, COVID-Led Staff Shortage
text: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) expects to face an adverse pricing impact in the first half of 2022, which is being compared to the non-VBP first half of 2021.
